# Mahatav Arora

> Freelance software developer, AI engineer, and designer based in Kelowna, BC, available for hire. I build custom software, AI tools, automation, web apps, and websites that help businesses work smarter, look credible, and win more customers. I handle each project end to end, from the first conversation through to launch, in plain English.

This is the portfolio and hire page of Mahatav Arora, a B.Sc. Computer Science student (Data Science minor) at the University of British Columbia. If you are looking for someone to build software, an AI feature, an automation, a web app, or a website, this is the right place. Work serves clients in Kelowna, BC and remotely worldwide, and spans custom software, full-stack web apps, applied AI/ML, computer vision, and research pipelines.

## Main page

- [Portfolio home](https://mahatav.github.io/): Overview of selected work, services and pricing, build experiments, research, and contact details.
- [Resume (PDF)](https://mahatav.github.io/Mahatav_Arora_Resume.pdf): Full CV with education, experience, and skills.

## Services and pricing

Custom software, AI, automation, web apps, and websites for businesses. Ranges below are Kelowna-market starting points; every project is quoted after a short conversation.

- Websites: marketing sites, online booking, and SEO. Fast, professional, built to get found on Google. From $1,500 to $3,500 CAD.
- Web Apps & Tools: custom web applications and internal tools built from scratch — dashboards, customer portals, booking systems, and integrations with existing systems. From $6,000 to $15,000 CAD.
- Software & AI Systems: bespoke software, AI features, workflow automation, data pipelines, and full custom systems built around how a business works. From $15,000 CAD and up.
- Standalone SEO: technical fixes, speed, local search and maps visibility, and reporting, whether or not Mahatav built the site.

## Selected work

- [Channeling Skinny Bob](https://channelingskinnybob.com/): End-to-end freelance build—a cinematic content platform with creative direction, a responsive Astro frontend, a hidden command-line archive, and a secure evidence-upload API.
- [OKGN Boat Rentals](https://mahatav.github.io/#work): Rental website rebuild with a multi-step booking flow, validation, spam protection, and PHP email delivery.
- [Green Construction Research & Training Center](https://github.com/Mahatav/GCRTC-Website): Multi-page publishing system for sustainable-construction research, with custom page indexing and search.
- [GPT-2, From Scratch](https://github.com/Mahatav/GPT-2_Scratch): A tested GPT-2-style language model implemented from tokenizer to generation loop in PyTorch.
- [TA Application System](https://mahatav.github.io/#work): Django hiring workflow with Ollama/FastAPI resume extraction and coordinator-grade applicant filtering.

## Research

- [Corpus-Conditioned Bias (PDF)](https://mahatav.github.io/research/Corpus_Conditioned_Bias.pdf): Training GPT-2 models on Eastern and Western philosophical texts and measuring output divergence across 284 prompts.
- [Pre/Post AI Comparisons (PDF)](https://mahatav.github.io/research/Pre_Post_AI_Comparisons.pdf): CodeBERT classifiers and repository scanners estimating whether capstone source files are human-written or AI-generated.
- [Jersey Number Recognition (PDF)](https://mahatav.github.io/research/Jersey_Number_Recognition.pdf): A multi-stage SoccerNet pipeline for reading jersey numbers in broadcast soccer video (under review).

- [GitHub](https://github.com/Mahatav): Open-source projects and code.
- [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/mahatav-arora): Professional profile and contact.
- [Contact form](https://mahatav.github.io/#contact): Reach out about a software, AI, automation, web app, or website project. Fastest way to start.
- Email: mahatavarora@gmail.com
- Location: Kelowna, BC, Canada. Available remotely worldwide. Currently booking new projects.
